name: Kindergarten Coins & Collectibles — Semester 2
description: An 18-week, play-based Kindergarten pathway for coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting. Lessons are brief, hands-on, flexible, and designed for adult-guided learning.
learningGoals: Build confidence and curiosity with coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting.
Communicate learning through talk, drawing, movement, play, or a simple creation.
Practice safe, kind, and responsible participation.

lessons.title: Notice and talk: coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting
lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting through a close look at coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting.

lessons.objective: I can notice details and share a question about coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting through a guided practice with coins as history, cataloging, and responsible collecting.
